title: Ensure switch statements have at least 3 case clauses
description: For better readability, switch statements should have at least 3 case clauses. If there are only one or two cases, use if statements instead.
recommendation: Replace switch statements with if statements when they have less than 3 case clauses.
impact: Improves readability and maintainability of the code.

checks.message: Replace switch statements with if statements when they have less than 3 case clauses.
